title: 'Today's setback hurts, come back stronger': PM Modi to Vinesh Phogat after Olympics disqualification | India News - Times of India
description: India News: NEW DELHI: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Wednesday expressed support for Indian wrestling champion Vinesh Phogat following her disqualification from.
